deviations.what: the Image src and LightBoxItem imageSrc keep the sample's original demokit sdk asset paths (test-resources/sap/ui/documentation/sdk/images/...) as literals 1:1; abap2UI5 does not serve those static assets, so the thumbnails/large images do not display offline. The LightBox still opens on image click (built-in Image.detailBox behaviour, no controller). The last item deliberately points imageSrc at a non-existent file to show the LightBox load-error state, exactly as in the sample.

the six identical filler paragraphs use the same ABAP literal via a local `lorem` variable; XML attribute whitespace (newlines/tabs in the sample's indented multi-line text) is normalised to single spaces (visually identical).
